order_placed.subject: Your Feel Safe order #{{order_id}} has been placed successfully!
order_placed.plainTextMessage: Thank you for your order, {{customer_name}}! We have successfully received order #{{order_id}} containing your items. You can view your invoice here: {{invoice_url}}
order_placed.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

Order Confirmed!

Hello {{customer_name}},

Thank you for your purchase! We have successfully processed your payment for order #{{order_id}}. Below is a summary of the items you purchased:

{{itemList}}
📄 Generate Invoice

This is an automated operational message regarding order {{order_id}}. Please do not reply directly to this email.

accepted.subject: Accepted: Your Feel Safe order is being prepared!
accepted.plainTextMessage: Good news, {{customer_name}}! Your Feel Safe order #{{order_id}} is now accepted and being prepared for dispatch.
accepted.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

Accepted ✅

Hello {{customer_name}}, your order #{{order_id}} has been accepted.

You can view your invoice here:

📄 View Invoice

This is an automated operational message regarding order {{order_id}}. Please do not reply directly to this email.

packed.subject: Packed: Your Feel Safe order is being prepared!
packed.plainTextMessage: Good news, {{customer_name}}! Your Feel Safe order #{{order_id}} is now packed and being prepared for dispatch.
packed.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

Packed 📦

Hello {{customer_name}}, your order #{{order_id}} is packed and ready for the next step.

You can view your invoice here:

This is an automated operational message regarding order {{order_id}}. Please do not reply directly to this email.

processing.subject: Processing: Your Feel Safe order is being prepared
processing.plainTextMessage: Hello {{customer_name}}, your Feel Safe order #{{order_id}} is now processing. We are finalizing your items for dispatch.
processing.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

Processing ⚙️

Hello {{customer_name}}, your order #{{order_id}} is currently being processed.

You can view your invoice here:

📄 View Invoice

This is an automated operational message regarding order {{order_id}}. Please do not reply directly to this email.

dispatched.subject: Dispatched: Your Feel Safe order is on the way
dispatched.plainTextMessage: Hi {{customer_name}}, good news! Your Feel Safe order #{{order_id}} has been dispatched. Please keep an eye on your delivery.
dispatched.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

Dispatched 🚚

Hello {{customer_name}}, your order #{{order_id}} has been dispatched.

You can view your invoice here:

📄 View Invoice

This is an automated operational message regarding order {{order_id}}. Please do not reply directly to this email.

delivered.subject: Delivered: Your Feel Safe package has arrived!
delivered.plainTextMessage: Great news! Your Feel Safe order has been safely delivered. Please check your mailbox or doorstep.
delivered.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

Package Delivered 🎉

Your shipment has been dropped off successfully at your designated delivery destination. We hope you love your new items!

Confirm Receipt

If you cannot find your parcel or believe this was triggered in error, please contact support immediately.

return-requested.subject: Return Requested: Awaiting Approval for Order
return-requested.plainTextMessage: We have received your return request for your Feel Safe order #{{order_id}}. It is currently under review. Please check your status in the orders section here: https://feelsafeco.in/account/orders
return-requested.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

Return Requested ⏳

{{customer_name}}, Your return request (#{{order_id}}) has been successfully submitted and is currently pending approval from our verification team. You will receive an update as soon as the review is complete.

View Order Status

If you did not initiate this return request or require further help with your order history, please contact support.

ticket_raised.subject: Support Ticket Created - Feel Safe Helpdesk
ticket_raised.plainTextMessage: Your support ticket has been logged into our system. Our technical helpdesk team is reviewing the issue and will get back to you shortly.
ticket_raised.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

Ticket Received

Hello, we have successfully generated a customer service ticket for your issue. Our dedicated support engineering staff is looking into your case details.

Expected Response Time: Within 12-24 business hours.

Please refrain from submitting duplicate records to avoid resetting your position in our customer service queue.

ticket_reply.subject: Update: New reply to your Feel Safe support ticket
ticket_reply.plainTextMessage: An agent has responded to your open support ticket. Please check your account dashboard to view the message response.
ticket_reply.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

New Agent Response

An engineering specialist has updated your open customer service file. Please tap below to access our platform portal and safely read the full transmission details.

View Support Thread

If the problem has resolved itself, you may close the communication window at your convenience.
